desc: RIC 77[tib] Sear 1786 Divus Augustus. AE dupondius, Rome. Posthumous issue, struck under Tiberius after AD 14. 31 mm, 16.88 g. DIVVS AVGVSTVS PATER, radiate head left. / S-C. Victo
